query: SELECT externalUserId, externalCompetenciaId, mediaAvaliacoesFinais, avaliacoesRespondidas, mediaAvaliacoesRespondidas, mediaAvaliacoesDisponiveis FROM student_performance WHERE mediaAvaliacoesFinais > 0 OR avaliacoesRespondidas > 0 LIMIT 10;
